title: contextweaver DiagnosticEvent envelope (telemetry v1)
description: One sanitized gateway diagnostic event, as emitted by GatewayTelemetry to a JSONL sink (contextweaver mcp serve --diagnostics FILE; issue #382). Events carry metadata only: identifiers, sizes, timings, argument key names, and error codes - never query text, argument values, result text, or artifact bytes. Additive evolution stays within v1; breaking changes publish a v2 schema directory.

event.description: Stable dot-separated event name, e.g. "browse.completed". The prefix determines the contract family (see docs/telemetry.md).

duration_ms.description: Operation latency in milliseconds, when applicable.

session_id.description: Gateway runtime session identifier; the correlation key across events of one session.

attributes.description: JSON-compatible metadata for the event. Must never contain payload content or argument values; consumers may flag values rendering longer than 2000 characters as likely payload leakage.
